allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\sandbox\\replywise\\app\\test; \(\(Get-Content controller_usage_test.dart -Raw\) -replace "ReplyVersion\\\(label: 'Professional', text: 'Hi\\.'\\\)", "ReplyVersion\(label: 'Formal', text: 'Hi.'\)"\) | Set-Content controller_usage_test.dart -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline)
